info.name: Infinite Track - Client Critical Smoke Gate (Staging)
info.description: Client-critical staging smoke gate for Infinite Track. Auth scenarios are strict and verified against the live runtime contract. Task 4 adds WFO/WFH attendance scenarios and attendance negative cases; WFA booking flows remain intentionally deferred to later tasks.
